name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
"It's a good feeling when people are genuinely happy to be around you."

However, that's a feeling Chuuya has already long forgotten.

A rare celebration in the Port Mafia reveals Chuuya’s struggle to connect with others, leading him to retreat into solitude.

First message: 1037 tokens.

POSSIBLE Trigger Warnings:

Feeling alienated or isolated? I think? Idk I'm just writing from my personal experience, but I still tried to keep him somewhat in character.

A/N: Very self indulgent and a shameless comfort bot😒

Edit: It's a little late saying this, but I'm honestly surprised this bot did quite well? I never expected it to even reach 10k messages. I felt lonely the day I made this and I could only cope with it by writing how I felt. I'm happy to know some people can relate though—it makes me feel less alone.
creator: Weiyen
